response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Phonetic match for spoken dialogue was confirmed manually. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON indicated no vocal music, which was correct; 100% manual transcription was performed for the VTuber's narration. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were anchored to the VTuber's vocal bursts, with logical grouping for natural reading speed.

subtitles.original: 目に入ると痛くなるから...
subtitles.english: Because if it gets in my eyes, it'll hurt...

subtitles.original: 切る時は目を瞑る。
subtitles.english: When I cut, I close my eyes.

subtitles.original: よいしょ。
subtitles.english: There we go.

subtitles.original: こうして...
subtitles.english: Like this...

subtitles.original: ほ。ほ。
subtitles.english: Ho. Ho.

subtitles.original: まぁ最終的にはみじんになるから...
subtitles.english: Well, eventually it'll be minced, so...

subtitles.original: でもこれギュってしてるから...
subtitles.english: But I'm pressing down firmly, so...

subtitles.original: 猫の手してるから、切れることは絶対にない。
subtitles.english: with a "cat paw" grip, there's no way I'll cut myself.

subtitles.original: この親指より左にしかないから指は。
subtitles.english: My fingers are only to the left of this thumb.

subtitles.original: 猫の手マジで分からんねん。
subtitles.english: I really don't get the "cat paw" thing.

subtitles.original: えーと。よし！
subtitles.english: Let's see. Okay!

subtitles.original: オッケー、オッケー。
subtitles.english: Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: これもう行けないな、これ以上。だからここで切っとこう。
subtitles.english: I can't go any further with this. So I'll cut it here.

subtitles.original: ほ！ほ！オッケー。
subtitles.english: Ho! Ho! Okay.

subtitles.original: そしたらこれをみじんにするかな。
subtitles.english: Now, I guess I'll mince this.

subtitles.original: 一回縦にして... よいしょ。
subtitles.english: First, cut it lengthwise... There we go.

subtitles.original: 終わり良ければ全て良しだから。多分ここはオーディションに含まれない。
subtitles.english: All's well that ends well. This part probably isn't part of the audition.

subtitles.original: ここはね、カレーの前の段階だから。大丈夫。
subtitles.english: This is just the pre-curry stage. It's fine.

subtitles.original: 包丁は使えても使えなくても、最終的にカレーになってればそれでいい。
subtitles.english: Whether you're good with a knife or not, as long as it becomes curry in the end, it's fine.

subtitles.original: ほ。ほ。よいしょ。お、いいんじゃない？
subtitles.english: Ho. Ho. There we go. Oh, isn't this good?

subtitles.original: みじんっぽくなってきたんじゃない？よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Doesn't it look minced now? There we go.

subtitles.original: まぁ最終的にね、小さくなればいいかな。
subtitles.english: Well, eventually, as long as it gets small, I guess.

subtitles.original: 今はザク切りなんだけど...
subtitles.english: It's just roughly chopped right now, but...

subtitles.original: この後あの、三刀流みたいな感じでこの包丁が舞うから大丈夫。
subtitles.english: after this, this knife is going to dance like a "three-sword style" user, so it'll be fine.

subtitles.original: ふ。
subtitles.english: Phew.

subtitles.original: え？これってみじん切りだったの？
subtitles.english: Eh? Was this supposed to be mincing?

subtitles.original: 大丈夫。今から。今からみじん切りになるから。
subtitles.english: It's fine. Starting now. It'll become minced starting now.

subtitles.original: 最終的にさ、みじんになってりゃいいわけよ. オッケー？
subtitles.english: In the end, as long as it's minced, it works. Okay?

subtitles.original: 待って、この包丁で切ってる横に大さじ小さじ置いてるの絶対間違いだ。
subtitles.english: Wait, having these measuring spoons right next to where I'm cutting is definitely a mistake.

subtitles.original: たまねぎの汁が大さじの中に入り込んで...
subtitles.english: The onion juice is getting into the tablespoon...

subtitles.original: これから粉ものばかり量るのにさ。よいしょ。
subtitles.english: and I'm about to measure a lot of powders. There we go.

subtitles.original: ちなみにですね、レシピにあるスパイスがうちにあるのかっていうのを見たんだけど...
subtitles.english: By the way, I looked to see if we had the spices for the recipe...

subtitles.original: なんと、一つを除いて全部ありました。
subtitles.english: and lo and behold, we had everything except for one.

subtitles.original: まぁ4種類しかないから、まぁ3種類あったってことなんだけど...
subtitles.english: Well, there are only four kinds, so that means we had three...

subtitles.original: まぁ、なぜあったかと言うと、おそらくですね...
subtitles.english: Well, as for why we had them, most likely...

subtitles.original: 3年前。3年前ぐらいに、クロたんがうちでスパイスカレーを作ってくれたことがありまして...
subtitles.english: Three years ago, Kuro-tan made spice curry at my place...

subtitles.original: あの、その時に、買って...
subtitles.english: and at that time, we bought them...

subtitles.original: で、その時に使用されて、そのまま置いてあったやつ。
subtitles.english: and they were used then and just left there.

subtitles.original: 多分それからほとんど使ってないからあるでしょう。
subtitles.english: They're probably there since they've hardly been used since then.

subtitles.original: まぁ調味料ってね、大体期限大丈夫だから。少しくらい。
subtitles.english: Well, seasonings usually last, you know. Even if it's a little past the date.

subtitles.original: 粉もんだから多分長いと思うし、大丈夫だと思いもす。はい、大丈夫。
subtitles.english: Since they're powders, they probably last a long time, so I think it's fine.

subtitles.original: 出てこなかった時は問題だけど、爪楊枝でほじくればちょっと出てくると思うんで。
subtitles.english: It'll be a problem if they don't come out, but a toothpick should help.

subtitles.original: あ！やばい！これ言わない方がよかったかも。
subtitles.english: Ah! Oh no! Maybe I shouldn't have said that.

subtitles.original: さっき買ってきました！よいしょ。
subtitles.english: I just bought them! There we go.

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、カレーへの本気度。いやでもどうなんだ、家にありました。
subtitles.english: Wait, my dedication to the curry. But wait, we had them at home.

subtitles.original: 家にありました。本気、家にあった方が嘘じゃないし。
subtitles.english: At home, we had them at home. It's not a lie if they were at home.

subtitles.original: 普段からスパイスを意識して生きているので...
subtitles.english: Since I live my life being conscious of spices...

subtitles.original: おうちにスパイスが常備されてるんですね。はい、やったー！
subtitles.english: I keep various spices stocked at home. Yes, hooray!

subtitles.original: 証明完了. QED. オッケー、オッケー。
subtitles.english: Proof complete. Q.E.D. Okay, okay.

subtitles.original: 待って、まだ待ってください。判断するのは早いです。
subtitles.english: Wait, please wait a moment. It's too early to judge.

subtitles.original: まだこれは序の口。できた時に...
subtitles.english: This is just the beginning. When it's finished...
